M Park Sarajevo is a multilingual private airport parking service near Sarajevo Airport.
The site offers Bosnian, English, and German pages under /bs, /en, and /de.
Key content includes parking pricing, reservation, secure parking information, transfer details, FAQ, privacy policy, and blog guides.
The site is built with Next.js and serves static content with localized SEO metadata, hreflang links, and schema markup.
For support, the service offers free airport transfer, secure fenced parking, CCTV, WhatsApp contact, and Google reviews.
